role: A TypeScript ambient type reference file that pulls in Vite client types for the app surface package.
capabilities: References Vite client ambient types for import.meta.env and Vite-specific APIs
Enables TypeScript type checking of Vite client features in the app
substance_why: The file contains only a single triple-slash reference directive and no custom type declarations or app-specific augmentations.
interactions_missing: Custom module declarations for app assets or workers
Type augmentation for environment variables used by the app
reuse_why: The Vite client type reference is a standard, necessary TypeScript support file and should be retained as-is.
decomposition_hints: No split needed; expand in place if app-specific environment or module type declarations are required
